candidates.name: BNB/USDT 1h Momentum Pullback

candidates.name: BNB/USDT 1h Mean-Reversion (RSI/Bollinger)
candidates.description: Fade capitulation below the lower Bollinger band while above the long-term trend; exit on reversion to the mean.
candidates.reasoning: Mean-reversion: buy oversold dislocations (below lower band + low RSI) but only with the long-term trend (above EMA200); take profit as price reverts toward the mean. Signal context: regime=risk_on, F&G=63, funding=0.0120%. [walk-forward: 10 OOS windows, beat buy&hold in 60%; median OOS +0.00% vs benchmark -1.99%; Sharpe -0.05, maxDD 4.1%, 3 trades, risk_score 52/100.]
